Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL EMPLOYEES

Title: Permits accidental death benefits and/or special accidental death benefits to be awarded to the beneficiary of Patricia Espinosa
Summary: Permits accidental death benefits and/or special accidental death benefits to be awarded to the beneficiary of Patricia Espinosa.
ActClause: AN ACT to permit accidental death benefits and/or special accidental death benefits to be awarded to the beneficiary of Patricia Espinosa
